name: Tomato & Avocado Pinwheel Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 each Avocados, peeled and pitted, cut into thin wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle tomato and avocado wedges with lime juice.
2. On a serving platter, arrange alternating slices of tomato and avocado in a pinwheel fashion.
3. To make the vinaigrette: Whisk together 1/2 cup Balsamic vinegar, 1 clove Garlic (minced), 3 tablespoons Onion (grated), 1 tablespoon Sweetener, and 1/4 cup Olive oil. Gradually pour in the olive oil while whisking to blend all ingredients.
4. Pour the vinaigrette over the wedges.
5. Serve.
